// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
using System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;

namespace TestNamespace
{
    partial class Status1
    {
        private static readonly Dictionary<int, Status1> _byValue = new Dictionary<int, Status1>()
        {
            [1] = Active,
        };

        private static readonly Dictionary<string, Status1> _byName = new Dictionary<string, Status1>()
        {
            ["Active"] = Active,
        };

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets all values of Status1 ordered by value.
        /// </summary>
        public static IReadOnlyCollection<Status1> GetAll() => _byValue.Values;

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets the Status1 instance from its value.
        /// </summary>
        public static Status1 FromValue(int value)
        {
            if (_byValue.TryGetValue(value, out var result))
                return result;
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No Status1 with value {value} found.");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets the Status1 instance from its name.
        /// </summary>
        public static Status1 FromName(string name)
        {
            if (_byName.TryGetValue(name, out var result))
                return result;
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No Status1 with name '{name}' found.");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Tries to get the Status1 instance from its value.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryFromValue(int value, [NotNullWhen(true)] out Status1? result)
        {
            return _byValue.TryGetValue(value, out result);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Tries to get the Status1 instance from its name.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryFromName(string name, [NotNullWhen(true)] out Status1? result)
        {
            return _byName.TryGetValue(name, out result);
        }

    }
}

    {
      HintName: Status2.g.cs,
      Content:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
using System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;

namespace TestNamespace
{
    [System.Text.Json.Serialization.JsonConverter(typeof(Status2JsonConverter))]
    partial class Status2
    {
        private static readonly Dictionary<int, Status2> _byValue = new Dictionary<int, Status2>()
        {
            [1] = Pending,
        };

        private static readonly Dictionary<string, Status2> _byName = new Dictionary<string, Status2>()
        {
            ["Pending"] = Pending,
        };

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets all values of Status2 ordered by value.
        /// </summary>
        public static IReadOnlyCollection<Status2> GetAll() => _byValue.Values;

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets the Status2 instance from its value.
        /// </summary>
        public static Status2 FromValue(int value)
        {
            if (_byValue.TryGetValue(value, out var result))
                return result;
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No Status2 with value {value} found.");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets the Status2 instance from its name.
        /// </summary>
        public static Status2 FromName(string name)
        {
            if (_byName.TryGetValue(name, out var result))
                return result;
            throw new InvalidOperationException($"No Status2 with name '{name}' found.");
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Tries to get the Status2 instance from its value.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryFromValue(int value, [NotNullWhen(true)] out Status2? result)
        {
            return _byValue.TryGetValue(value, out result);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Tries to get the Status2 instance from its name.
        /// </summary>
        public static bool TryFromName(string name, [NotNullWhen(true)] out Status2? result)
        {
            return _byName.TryGetValue(name, out result);
        }

    }

#if NET6_0_OR_GREATER
    public class Status2JsonConverter : System.Text.Json.Serialization.JsonConverter<Status2>
    {
        public override Status2? Read(ref System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader reader, Type typeToConvert, System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions options)
        {
            if (reader.TokenType == System.Text.Json.JsonTokenType.Number && reader.TryGetInt32(out var value))
            {
                return Status2.TryFromValue(value, out var result) ? result : null;
            }
            if (reader.TokenType == System.Text.Json.JsonTokenType.String)
            {
                var name = reader.GetString();
                return name != null && Status2.TryFromName(name, out var result) ? result : null;
            }
            return null;
        }

        public override void Write(System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter writer, Status2 value, System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions options)
        {
            writer.WriteNumberValue(value.Value);
        }
    }
#endif
}

    }
  ]
